'''Ralltiir Consolidated Marble''' was a marble mining corporation on [[Ralltiir/Legends|Ralltiir]]. Subsidized by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the company did not know that its fiercest rival, [[XwiziMarble|Xwizi Marble]], was secretly supporting the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].<ref name="CatCW" />

{{Company-stub}}
